claim_boundary: v6.0.4 proves linear phase no-selection and finds one exact round-S7 octave commensurability, but the accepted parent family does not supply the selected nonlinear field, coefficient, stable coherent solution, or negative invariant sigma-Hessian shift needed for physicality selection.

finite_container.Robin_phase_shift: depends on unsourced real Robin endomorphism
finite_container.boundary_detuning: must enter the resonance equation and is not evaluated
finite_container.collar_phase: requires physical collar length and propagation operator
finite_container.mode_spacing: scales as 1/L only after geometry/domain selection
finite_container.standing_waves: require a selected bulk radial operator
